name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTransit brackets forward-flight skew-wake arrival time for rotor-resolved cruise probes.
note: Primary audit surface for transient A4MC powered-cruise skew-wake probes.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_probe_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeProbeMap supplies rotor-resolved probe coordinates wake speeds and pressure targets.
note: Spatial probe contract input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_wake_footprint
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseWakeFootprint supplies the skew-wake footprint used by the probe map.
note: Skew-wake footprint context input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies per-rotor source terms that anchor the probe rows.
note: Rotor source-term input.

name: drone_config_dynamic_inflow
value: DroneConfig RotorSpec induced inflow time constants provide the configured lag comparison.
note: Dynamic inflow lag reference.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream CFD target for live transient cruise skew-wake probes.
note: Upstream CFD target for live validation.
